name: Agent Delivery Engineering Predictive Reliability Framework (2607.07689)
content: Long-horizon LLM multi-agent systems face reliability risks invisible to infrastructure monitoring. We propose the ADE Predictive Reliability Framework (ADE-PRF), enabling proactive health trajectory prediction from passive degradation detection. ADE-PRF aggregates 20 heterogeneous signals across five layers into a Trust Margin (TM) metric (39.2-point dynamic range). Triple-method parallel prediction enables 8-hour forecasts: the Exponential method achieves MAE=1.228, Direction Accuracy=76.8%, w
summary: Long-horizon LLM multi-agent systems face reliability risks that are difficult to detect through infrastructure monitoring. The ADE Predictive Reliability Framework (ADE-PRF) addresses this by aggregating heterogeneous signals into a Trust Margin (TM) metric, enabling proactive health trajectory prediction and 8-hour forecasts with high accuracy.
key_insights: ADE-PRF can identify 'false prosperity' where degradation is masked by normal metrics, providing early warnings for production LLM agents.
ADE-PRF integrates TM with ground-truth states upon ADE plugin integration, leveraging data from 16 out of 20 factors.
Exponential method consistently outperforms Kalman in the framework.
xihe_relevance: ADE-PRF的预测可靠性框架可以提供早期的生产LLM代理的可靠性量化，并提供前瞻性的警告，这可能对曦和系统的潜在价值很高。
